name: cn-handoff
description: Create and resume verified project handoffs across Codex tasks and hosts.

interface.shortDescription: Verified project continuity across tasks and hosts.
interface.longDescription: Creates evidence-backed project state files and reconstructs context in a new Codex task without assuming hidden conversation continuity.
defaultPrompt: Use $handoff with `handoff 交班` for this project.
Use $handoff with `handoff 接班` and verify the live workspace.
